one_time_description: Claim settlement received during the year
economic_notes: Nation has investments in NSE Development (Phase 2) Limited Partnership, Tsu Holdings Limited Partnership, NSE (Phase 2) GP Inc., Hul'q'humi'num Fisheries Limited Partnership, and Ts'uubaa-asatx Development Corporation. NSE Development (Phase 2) LP generated net income of $1,734,746 in 2022.
notes: Audit is qualified because Hul'q'humi'num Fisheries Limited Partnership financial information was not available and not included in consolidated statements. Four government business enterprises accounted for on modified equity basis: Hul'q'humi'num Fisheries LP, Tsu Holdings LP, NSE Development (Phase 2) LP, and Ts'uubaa-asatx Development Corporation. Large claim settlement of $4,638,491 significantly inflated revenue and surplus in 2022. Revenue lines on the summary statement of operations differ slightly from the segmented totals; figures from the summary statement of operations used. No schedule of remuneration included in the financial statements. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC $963,844 + FNHA $1,018,734 + Province of BC $140,124 + Dept of Fisheries $1,163,466 + Federal Government $100,000 = $3,386,168. OSR includes claim settlement, share of income from controlled entities, gaming, rental, treaty support, Kwumut Lelum, property tax, and other revenue.
